app.hubDescription: Select an interface below to view its specific functional dashboard or mobile application.
app.citizenPanelDesc: Personal dashboard for citizens to view impact, manage EcoTokens, and request pickups on Desktop/Tablet.
app.municipalityDesc: Desktop admin panel for city-wide overview, map tracking and overall metrics.
app.citizenImpactDesc: Mobile application interface for citizens to track personal recycling impact.
app.collectorDesc: Mobile tablet tool for collectors to follow active routes and scan bins.
app.facilityDesc: Desktop dashboard for facility managers to review intake and processes.
app.sortingDesc: Mobile interface for sorting floor workers to manage batches.

login.signUpToManage: Sign up to manage city waste
login.passMinLengthMsg: Password must be at least 6 characters
